page: Microsoft Azure F32as_v6 is an x86_64 architecture server belonging to the Fasv6 family, powered by a dedicated AMD EPYC 9V74 processor. It features 32 physical cores and 32 vCPUs operating at a base frequency of 3.7 GHz, with one thread per core. The system is equipped with 128.0 GB of system memory, providing 4.0 GB of RAM per core. It does not include local storage or bundled GPUs, but it is Premium Storage capable and runs on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor.

Benchmark data indicates strong computational performance. The single-core CPU performance via stress-ng ranks in the top tier, while multi-core performance is in the top 25%. Geekbench results show top-tier multi-core performance and image processing capabilities, alongside strong scores in software compilation, ray tracing, and text processing. Memory performance is robust, with cached read-only small block bandwidth in the top 25% and write bandwidth for large blocks also in the top 25%.

This server is well-suited for compute-intensive workloads such as image processing, software compilation, and database operations, as evidenced by its strong PassMark database score and high Redis SET operations throughput. It also demonstrates capable performance in small-to-medium language model inference, achieving top-tier prompt processing speeds with a 135M model. Because it lacks local storage, workloads requiring high-speed local scratch space must rely on external Premium Storage, which represents a key architectural tradeoff.
description: Microsoft Azure F32as_v6 is a compute-focused x86_64 server from the Fasv6 family, powered by a dedicated AMD EPYC 9V74 processor. It features 32 physical cores and 32 vCPUs running at 3.7 GHz, paired with 128.0 GB of RAM. The instance lacks local storage and GPUs but is Premium Storage capable. Benchmarks reveal top-tier single-core and multi-core CPU performance, with strong memory bandwidth and high efficiency in image processing and software compilation. It is highly suited for compute-intensive tasks, database operations, and small-to-medium scale language model inference.
og_description: Microsoft Azure F32as_v6 is a compute-focused server featuring 32 dedicated AMD EPYC cores at 3.7 GHz and 128 GB of RAM. It delivers top-tier CPU performance for database operations and software compilation.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure F32as_v6 is an x86_64 server with 32 dedicated AMD EPYC cores, 128 GB RAM, and top-tier CPU performance for compute-heavy workloads.
tagline: A dedicated 32-core AMD EPYC server delivering top-tier compute and memory performance for demanding database and processing workloads.
bullet_points: 32 dedicated AMD EPYC 9V74 cores running at 3.7 GHz
128.0 GB of system memory providing 4.0 GB per core
Top-tier single-core and multi-core CPU benchmark performance
Premium Storage capable with no local disk storage included
Optimized for database operations, image processing, and software compilation
